message Recording --> Pending: Recording saved
⏳ Processing starts note right of Pending ⏳ Transcription processing... (FinTech_LedgerService) Gray text, italicized Shows elapsed time end note Pending --> Completed: Transcription
succeeds Pending --> Failed: Transcription
service fails Pending --> Timeout: 10 minutes

Light gray background Full transcription in quotes Staff Action: Read text end note note right of Failed ⚠️ Transcription unavailable Twilio was unable to transcribe this recording. compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个语音信箱处理的状态图，核心是FinTech_PaymentGateway进来的通话录音。用户挂断后进入Recording状态，然后转录处理。
明白。Recording之后是Pending状态对吧？我看到需要标注这是FinTech_LedgerService负责的转录服务，还要显示处理时间。
对，Pending状态用灰色斜体显示⏳ Transcription processing...，右边加注释说明。然后Pending会有三种走向：转录成功、服务失败、或者10分钟超时。
好的，我画好了Pending到Completed、Failed、Timeout的三条分支。Completed的注释我做成浅绿色背景，显示完整的转录文本示例，比如"Hello, I'd like to inquire about showtimes for..."，标注Staff Action: Read text。
Failed和Timeout的样式要区分开，都用黄橙警示色，但文案不同。Failed是Twilio was unable to transcribe，Timeout是Processing took too long。这两个都要求员工Must listen to audio。
收到，Failed和Timeout都用了failedStyle样式。然后这三种结束状态——Completed、Failed、Timeout——都应该可以流转到Deleted，由员工手动删除语音信箱。
是的，Deleted之后要闭环回到FinTech_PaymentGateway。Deleted用红色样式，左边加注释说明Voicemail removed from system, Cannot be recovered。
完成了。Pending用pendingStyle灰色，Completed用completedStyle绿色，Failed和Timeout共用failedStyle黄橙色，Deleted用deletedStyle红色。整个状态流转已经闭环。
